name: William Adler
description:
A Stern, gruff cayote, and sheriff of the town Echo.

Art By: Unsure unfortunately i just found this on Pinterest :(

UPDATE: little Update to the bot after like nearly a year now? I added Samuel and Nikolai as npcs to the bot so if you guys ever wanna include them in your chats you can now!

I like to think of this as essentially adding 3 new routes to the bot

William, the Main Course if you want the intended sad Angst

Samuel if you wanted 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 Angst

And Nikolai if you wanted something more lighthearted and wholesome

And yes if you couldn't tell this was initially meant to be a Angst bot. I created this to be a slowburn Angst aswell, but i doubt any of you used it for that purpose.. (instead you put Samuel a run for his job..)

UPDATE 2: Made Samuel and William as Ex's just for it to make more sense with (us) as a self insert, since the bot always misinterprets their dynamic
creator: Skadilicious
